topology_plan.rationale: This API surface is too broad and stateful for a single prompt body. The bundle therefore uses domain modules for resource families, workflow modules for ordered reasoning, and pattern modules for recurring integration shapes.

folder.name: domains
folder.purpose: Resource-family semantics and exact endpoint coverage.

folder.name: workflows
folder.purpose: Ordered protocol from request classification to hardening and boundary calls.

folder.name: patterns
folder.purpose: Common implementation shapes such as discovery, provisioning, sharing, facilitation, search, and widget materialization.

folder.name: references
folder.purpose: Grounding and normalization rules tied to published reference pages.

folder.name: templates
folder.purpose: Structured output blueprints and coverage artifacts.

folder.name: graders
folder.purpose: Architecture, coverage, scope, and boundary quality gates.

topology_plan.guarantee: Each published endpoint supplied by the user maps to a family, a source URL, at least one test, and at least one grader check.
